changeSet.author: hivearmor

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM hive_compliance_standard WHERE standard_name = 'DORA'

changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO hive_compliance_standard (standard_name, standard_description, system_owner) VALUES ( 'DORA', 'EU Digital Operational Resilience Act (2022/2554). Mandatory ICT risk management, incident reporting, and resilience testing for financial sector entities.', true )

INSERT INTO hive_compliance_standard_section (standard_id, standard_section_name, standard_section_description) SELECT s.id, v.name, v.descr FROM hive_compliance_standard s CROSS JOIN (VALUES ('ICT Risk Management', 'Articles 5-9: ICT risk management framework, governance, protection, prevention, and detection measures.'), ('Incident Management', 'Articles 10-19: Response, recovery, classification, and mandatory reporting of major ICT-related incidents.'), ('Resilience Testing', 'Articles 24-25: Digital operational resilience testing including scenario-based testing and threat-led penetration testing (TLPT).'), ('Third-Party Risk', 'Articles 28-44: ICT third-party risk management, contractual requirements, and oversight of critical ICT providers.') ) AS v(name, descr) WHERE s.standard_name = 'DORA'

changeSet.author: hivearmor

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM hive_compliance_control_config c JOIN hive_compliance_standard_section sec ON c.standard_section_id = sec.id JOIN hive_compliance_standard std ON sec.standard_id = std.id WHERE std.standard_name = 'DORA'

changeSet.author: hivearmor

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM hive_compliance_control_mapping m JOIN hive_compliance_control_config c ON m.control_id = c.id JOIN hive_compliance_standard_section sec ON c.standard_section_id = sec.id JOIN hive_compliance_standard std ON sec.standard_id = std.id WHERE std.standard_name = 'DORA'
